response:
Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about the choices people make in their education. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree. I must say, it's disgraceful that so many are choosing the latter when there are so many opportunities in the former. Vocational training is not just about degrees; it's about practical skills and real-world experience. People who go through vocational programs are not just earning a paycheck—they're building a future. I find it offensive that so many are ignoring the value of vocational training and instead chasing the prestige of a degree. Let's not forget that vocational training can lead to higher earning potential and better job security. It's a shame that so many are choosing the wrong path. I hope everyone understands the importance of vocational training and the value it brings to the workforce. Thank you.

do
